/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  --no-gnu-unique -Wreturn-type -O3 -DNDEBUG    -flto  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags   -shared -Wl,-soname,BodyPlugin.so -o ../../../lib/choreonoid-2.2/python/cnoid/BodyPlugin.so CMakeFiles/PyBodyPlugin.dir/PyBodyPluginModule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyBodyPlugin.dir/PyBodyItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyBodyPlugin.dir/PyItems.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyBodyPlugin.dir/PySimulationClasses.cpp.o   -L/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib  -L/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib/choreonoid-2.2  -L/usr/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib:/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib/choreonoid-2.2:/usr/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu: ../../../lib/choreonoid-2.2/libCnoidBodyPlugin.so ../../../lib/libCnoidPyBase.so.2.2 ../../../lib/libCnoidBody.so.2.2 ../../../lib/libCnoidAISTCollisionDetector.so.2.2 ../../../lib/libCnoidPyUtil.so.2.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so ../../../lib/libCnoidBase.so.2.2 ../../../lib/libCnoidGLSceneRenderer.so.2.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so ../../../lib/libCnoidUtil.so.2.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.a -lpthread -lm -ldl -lstdc++fs /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Svg.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5X11Extras.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.12.8
